# cairn vault

Manage the vault registry (brief §3.3)

## Help

```text
Manage the vault registry (brief §3.3)

Usage: vault <COMMAND>

Commands:
  add     Register a vault in the registry
  list    List registered vaults
  switch  Set the default vault
  remove  Remove a vault from the registry (does not delete files)
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## Subcommands

- [`cairn vault add`](vault-add.md) - Register a vault in the registry
- [`cairn vault list`](vault-list.md) - List registered vaults
- [`cairn vault switch`](vault-switch.md) - Set the default vault
- [`cairn vault remove`](vault-remove.md) - Remove a vault from the registry (does not delete files)
